case_title: TAURRICA MARIE JOHNSON VS. DOMINIC NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING CURRENTLY SET FOR SEP-20-2023]; (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DOMINIC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-01-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>); REMARKS: A RESIDENT OF THE UNIT(WHO REFUSED TO GIVE HER NAME)STATED THAT SHE WOULD GIVE C/O PAPERWORK TO DEFENDANT THIS WEEK. RESIDENT IS 50-60 Y/O AFA. SERVED AUG-03-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DOMINIC
ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, TAURRICA MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DOMINIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, TAURRICA MARIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. PLAINTIFF TAURRICA MARIE JOHNSON APPEARED. DEFENDANT DOMINIC NGUYEN APPEARED. HONG HA, VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER APPEARED FOR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
